_comment: Single contract source (S2). The judge AND the server both read this. Change vocabulary here only — never hard-code it in the server. Bump the matching version when you change a section.

unit.label: item
unit._comment: Review unit follows the judgment unit (S7). To re-key (e.g. per-item -> cross-item cluster), change id_fields and bump version.unit.

axes.label: 懸念
axes._comment: Actionable flag is binary screening; strength stays as evidence (P1 standing recommendation). Labels/vocabulary are the domain's own words (S2) — set them in whatever language the reviewers use.

axes.label: 根拠の質
axes._comment: Second axis so the developer surface shows the config-driven, multi-axis case. Adapt or delete per domain.
